title: 你好，请用一句话介绍你自己

messages.content: 你好，请用一句话介绍你自己

**Welcome to Super Agent Platform!**

The system is running, but no LLM API Key is configured yet.

To get started:
1. Edit `backend/.env`
2. Set your `OPENAI_API_KEY`
3. Restart the backend server

You can also configure DeepSeek or any OpenAI-compatible API.
